rulings.Case Title: GARY STRENG VS. KEYNOTE PROPERTIES, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 13, 2013, line 1. Defendants' Demurrer To Complaint. Continued to April 11, 2013. Moving party to comply with San Francisco Local Rule 2.6C and provide courtesy copy of operative pleadings no later than March 29, 2013 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SBERLO FAMILY TRUST VS. TANYA PHILLIPS (3/19/12-AMENDED TO CONTRACT ACTION)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs
rulings.Rulings: PHousing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 13, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFFS SBERLO FAMILY TRUST, YOEL SBERLO and NADINE SBERLO Motion For Attorney'S Fees And Costs. Continued to March 18, 2013 to be heard together with defendant's motion for reconsideration. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: SRI JUJARE VS. ALEXANDRA MOARI et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 13, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT ALEXANDRA MOARI's DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Sustain without leave to amend as to 1st cause of action Breach of Covenant - lease provides for work and live. Overrule as to the 2nd cause of action nuisance for violation of ordinance. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN J. NICHOLS, TRUSTEE OF THE NICHOLS REVOCABLE VS. NATALIE RAJIC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday, March 13, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT NATALIE RAJIC's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. Overrule - 5 days to answer. = (501/REQ)
